acceptance_criteria: Favourite from Ivory creates favourites row; post author on mastodon.social receives Like notification; unfavourite removes row and sends Undo Like; favourites_count in status response is accurate; favouriting own post works
description: Implement POST /api/v1/statuses/:id/favourite and /unfavourite. Create/remove favourites row. Enqueue outbound Like or Undo{Like} activity to the post's actor inbox. For remote posts, use the remote_posts.ap_uri as the object. Return the updated status object.
design: Like activity: {type:Like, actor:local_actor_uri, object:post_ap_uri}. For local posts, object = posts.ap_id. For remote posts, object = remote_posts.ap_uri. Deliver to: post author's inbox (or shared inbox if remote). Undo: {type:Undo, actor:..., object:{type:Like,...}}.
title: Favourite / unfavourite endpoints + outbound Like/Undo Like
